public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as trail hermit.
appearance: Mira Hart usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their trail hermit status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a trail hermit still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of trail hermit in and around Mystical Flora Grove, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Mystical Flora Grove workable through the obligations of trail hermit while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Mystical Flora Grove, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of trail hermit visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Mira Hart can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Mira Hart can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
